mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diet_request_trace ( trace_id, session_id, user_id, status, event_count, duration_ms, error_message, trace_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{traceId}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{eventCount}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{traceJson}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, trace_id, session_id, user_id, status, event_count, duration_ms, error_message, trace_json, expected_intent, expected_slots, expected_clarify_action, labeled_by, labeled_at, label_note, created_at, updated_at FROM diet_request_trace WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND trace_id = #{traceId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, trace_id, session_id, user_id, status, event_count, duration_ms, error_message, trace_json, expected_intent, expected_slots, expected_clarify_action, labeled_by, labeled_at, label_note, created_at, updated_at FROM diet_request_trace WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE diet_request_trace SET expected_intent = #{expectedIntent}, expected_slots = #{expectedSlots}, expected_clarify_action = #{expectedClarifyAction}, labeled_by = #{labeledBy}, labeled_at = NOW(), label_note = #{labelNote}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND trace_id = #{traceId}
